task.name: Update standard dashboard widget headings to h2
task.action:
Edit the following files: - `src/components/dashboard/AccountsSummary.tsx` - `src/components/dashboard/AssetCategoriesChart.tsx` - `src/components/dashboard/MonthlySummaryChart.tsx` - `src/components/dashboard/RecentTransactions.tsx`
Change their main title elements to use: `
`
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm no errors. Visually verify the headings look consistent.

task.name: Update NetWorthHistoryChart heading
task.action:
Edit `src/components/dashboard/NetWorthHistoryChart.tsx`: Change the main title `
` to `
` while preserving the `mt-6` margin top. Change to: `
`
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm no errors.

task.name: Update TotalNetWorthCard heading
task.action:
Edit `src/components/dashboard/TotalNetWorthCard.tsx`: Change the main title `
` to `
` with larger classes. Both instances (loading skeleton and main display) should be updated. Change to: `
`
task.verify: Run `npm run build` to confirm no errors. Visually verify the title stands out slightly from the rest of the widgets.

task.name: Lint, Test, and Final Visual Check
task.action: Run the following commands sequentially: 1. `npm run lint` — must pass with zero errors. 2. `npm run test` — must pass. Update any tests broken by changing p tags to h2 tags. 3. `npm run build` — must compile with zero errors. 4. Visually verify: - All dashboard widgets show consistent heading typography. - The layout has not materially changed besides the cleaner font. - Dark and light modes look appropriate with `text-foreground`.
task.verify: All commands exit with code 0. Dashboard renders correctly.
